ideation: This animation sequence simulates swatting a mosquito. It starts with both arms relaxed at the sides, then one arm swings forward to swat, followed by a return to the neutral position. The other arm remains relatively still to maintain balance. The sequence uses the robot's two shoulder joints to create a realistic swatting motion, with slight variations in wrist position to improve the gesture's naturalism. Frame 1 shows a neutral starting position, Frame 2 shows the right arm moving to swat, Frame 3 shows the right arm returning to neutral, and Frame 4 shows both arms returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, waiting for the pest
the right arm swings forward in a sharp swat
the right arm snaps back to the side
both arms return to a neutral, still pose
